person_name: Gordian I, Roman Emperor (r. 238, the elder Gordian)
person_name_full: Gordian I, Roman Emperor (r. 238, the elder Gordian)
notes: Roman emperor in 238 CE, known as the elder Gordian; noted for his virtuous character and scholarly interests.

docs.title: Life of Gordiani Tres
docs.author: Historia Augusta (anonymous)
docs.excerpt: 7 1 But all his virtuous behaviour profited him nothing. For this old man, worthy of respect as such a life had made him, who passed his days with Plato and Aristotle, Cicero and Vergil, finally suffered an end other than that he deserved.

docs.title: Life of Maximini Duo
docs.author: Historia Augusta (anonymous)
docs.excerpt: We have given to him the title of Augustus, and not only to him, but also, for the further safeguarding of the state, to that excellent man Gordian his son.
